message:
feat(watcher): Recursive remove support + E2E and watcher tests

watcher/watcher.go:
- Enhance Remove() to handle recursive watchers correctly
- When removing a directory in recursive mode, also remove all
  individually-watched subdirectories
- Clean up snapshots for the removed path and all paths beneath it
- Collect and return first error when removing multiple paths

watcher/watcher_test.go:
- Add comprehensive watcher unit tests

e2e/suite_test.go:
- Expand E2E test suite with new test scenarios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
